name: Lianna Accent Bench Cream: Upholstered Velvet, Solid Wood Legs, Transitional Style
description:
The Lianna Accent Bench offers a fashionably unique update to your living room or entryway. This accent bench is upholstered in a rich velvet fabric and features a low back and sides, for a chic transitional look. The solid wood legs flaunt a dark brown finish that adds a bold contrast to the upholstery. Leg assembly is required and a tool is included.

Overall Height: 23.75 inches
Overall Width: 49 inches
Overall Depth: 19.5 inches
Seat Width: 44 inches
Seat Depth: 17 inches
Seat to Floor Height: 18.25 inches
